#[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)]
pub enum AppError {
    #[error("division by zero")]
    DivisionByZero,
    #[error("invalid port number: {0}")]
    InvalidPort(String),
    #[error("port must be non-zero")]
    ZeroPort,
    #[error("missing required environment variable: {0}")]
    MissingEnv(String),
}

pub fn divide(a: i64, b: i64) -> Result<i64, AppError> {
    if b == 0 {
        return Err(AppError::DivisionByZero);
    }
    Ok(a / b)
}

pub fn parse_port(s: &str) -> Result<u16, AppError> {
    let port: u16 = s
        .parse()
        .map_err(|_| AppError::InvalidPort(s.to_string()))?;
    if port == 0 {
        return Err(AppError::ZeroPort);
    }
    Ok(port)
}

pub fn get_config_value(key: &str) -> Result<String, AppError> {
    std::env::var(key).map_err(|_| AppError::MissingEnv(key.to_string()))
}
